name: artcade-v2
description: ArtCade V2: Dual-runtime 2D game engine (C++ native + WebAssembly)

scripts.build:cpp: cd runtime-cpp && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . --config Release
scripts.build:wasm: cd runtime-cpp && mkdir -p build && cd build && emcmake cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build .
